enforced: DTD Configuration 1.3 (https://checkstyle.org/dtds/configuration_1_3.dtd) — current, non-deprecated DTD declaration
UnusedImports, RedundantImport, and AvoidStarImport are machine-enforced at the TreeWalker level
EqualsHashCode, EqualsAvoidNull, FinalClass, MissingSwitchDefault, and FallThrough catch common correctness bugs
NeedBraces, EmptyBlock, LeftCurly/RightCurly, and Indentation (basicOffset=4) enforce structural style machine-checkably
LineLength (max 120), FileTabCharacter, and NewlineAtEndOfFile are machine-enforced at the Checker (file) level
note: Checkstyle only lints; it does not reformat. Pair with a formatter (e.g. google-java-format) for auto-fix; this baseline documents the enforced rule set only.
